channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Air Force Major Arrested at Capitol During Protest Calling for Trump’s Impeachment
item.description:
An active-duty US Air Force major, Jason Watson, was arrested at the US Capitol after staging a protest calling for President Donald Trump’s impeachment, prompting a military investigation
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/dailynews/air-force-major-arrested-capitol-trump-impeachment-2026
